description: Engagement document in Hebrew (shiddukhin). Dated 1 Kislev 5567 AM (1806 CE) for Me'ir ha-Levi b. Moshe and Raḥma bt. Avraham Krispin. The wedding date is set for Hanukkah of the following year (5568 AM).
tags: Late Heb, Hanukkah, 19th c, engagement, Krispin
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
